name: com.u2re.ioclient
description: NativeScript background daemon for clipboard and platform API access

scripts.android:emu:list: node -e "const p=process.env.ANDROID_HOME; if(!p) throw new Error('ANDROID_HOME not set'); require('child_process').execFileSync(p+'\\\\emulator\\\\emulator.exe',['-list-avds'],{stdio:'inherit'});"
scripts.android:adb:remote:connect: node -e "const target=process.env.ADB_REMOTE_TARGET||'192.168.0.110:5555'; const { execFileSync } = require('child_process'); execFileSync('adb', ['connect', target], { stdio: 'inherit' });"
scripts.android:adb:remote:disconnect: node -e "const target=process.env.ADB_REMOTE_TARGET||'192.168.0.110:5555'; const { execFileSync } = require('child_process'); execFileSync('adb', ['disconnect', target], { stdio: 'inherit' });"
scripts.android:devices:remote:only: node -e "const target=process.env.ADB_REMOTE_TARGET||'192.168.0.110:5555'; const { execSync } = require('child_process'); const out=execSync('adb devices -l', { encoding:'utf8' }); console.log(out); const lines=out.split(/\r?\n/).filter(Boolean); const found=lines.find((line)=>line.startsWith(target)); if (found){ console.log('Found target:', found);} else { console.log('Target not connected:', target); }"
scripts.android:adb:reset: pwsh -NoProfile -Command "adb kill-server; Start-Sleep -Milliseconds 300; adb start-server; adb devices -l"
